backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (site rebuild, hero section, about section, etc.) to their associated files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file for build planning and documentation purposes.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Luna's Kitchen SEO title, meta description, and keywords targeting 'Best Tacos in Los Lunas NM', mounting the React app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the single-page layout by rendering Header, Homepage, and Footer without any client-side routing.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About section featuring a two-column layout with Luna's Kitchen origin story paragraphs, a quesabirria taco image with overlay, and a decorative 4.9-star badge.
frontend/src/components/CallToAction.tsx: Bold chili-red CTA banner with a 'Craving Authentic Mexican Flavor?' heading and two action buttons linking to the phone number and Google Maps directions.
frontend/src/components/Experience.tsx: 'Why Choose Us?' section on a dark chili background displaying five highlight cards covering rating, pricing, speed, freshness, and family-friendliness.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social media links, contact details, and business hours for Luna's Kitchen.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a call CTA button, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, tagline, and CTA buttons for calling, getting directions, and ordering takeout.
frontend/src/components/Location.tsx: Location section displaying address, phone, and weekly hours in styled cards alongside an embedded map area for Luna's Kitchen.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Menu section rendering a grid of six food items (tacos, burritos, burgers, etc.) with images, descriptions, and labeled tags.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Customer reviews section displaying three 5-star testimonials in cards with reviewer name, date, and a verified badge.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no active code, reserved for future backend query hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Oswald, Nunito), configures Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for Luna's Kitchen's warm Mexican street-food color theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for a future About page.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for a future Contact page.
frontend/src/pages/Homepage.tsx: Homepage component that composes all landing page sections (Hero, AboutUs, Menu, Experience, Reviews, Location, CallToAction) in order.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for a future dedicated Menu page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining Luna's Kitchen's brand color palettes (chili, salsa), custom fonts (Oswald, Nunito), container settings, dark mode, and plugin integrations (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing Luna's Kitchen website goals, business details, architectural notes, required images, and implemented features at version 7.
